name: gtm-engineering-command-center
description: Autonomous GTM operating system. 14 agents, 21 commands, 15 skills, 4 cloud routines. Multichannel orchestration, AARRR funnel diagnostics, Tribe v2 neural pre-testing for creatives, browser QA (Playwright + Computer Use), cross-channel attribution, codebase-aware asset generation, and always-on optimization via Claude Code Routines.
